data.title: Meta Stock Has Soared Almost 50% Over A Year But Now The Company Is Slashing Staff Stock Awards As It Braces To Face OpenAI, Amazon And Others In AI Race
data.description: Meta is reportedly reducing employee stock awards by 10% while ramping up AI investments to as much as $65 billion in 2025.

data.title: Gary Black Left Unimpressed By Rivian's Earnings : Calls 2025 Guidance 'Clearly Weak'
data.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. shares rose over 5% in after-hours trading Wednesday before pulling back, despite delivering conservative 2025 guidance, as strong regulatory credit sales helped the electric vehicle maker beat fourth-quarter expectations.

data.title: Dogecoin 'Millionaire' Pushes 'Conviction Plays' Like PEPE Like There's No Tomorrow: 'Best Time To Start Buying'
data.description: Glauber Contessoto, popularly known as SlumDOGE Millionaire, advocated buying  ‘conviction plays’ like frog-themed Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) on Thursday, amid a broader slump in the meme coin market.

data.title: BABA Stock Climbs Over 4% In Friday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. (NYSE: BABA) climbed 4% during the pre-market trading session on Friday following strong financial performance for the third quarter.

data.title: Tesla Bull Says Rivian Is A Long Way From Making Money: 'Absent Volkswagen And Amazon As Sugar Daddies They Would Probably Be History'
data.description: Rivian reported a quarterly gross profit of $170 million for the first time in the fourth quarter owing to the sale of regulatory credits.
